com.highbrowinteractive.truck.masters.in.notes:
We’ve made improvements to enhance your driving experience:
• Performance optimizations
• Bug fixes and stability improvements
• Minor gameplay refinements

com.JindoBlu.FourPlayersIOS.title: 1 2 3 4 Player Games

com.mattel163.uno.title: UNO!™
com.mattel163.uno.notes:
New Season: Summer Splashers!
6.29-8.30: Collect cool new beachside Cards, Decorations, and rewards!
Take the Slide into Summer Season Pass and splash into a cool new card deck!
7.20-8.16: Colors of Summer Canvas, sunny Emojis & limited UNO Button

6.29-7.5: Goodies Sorting & Skyrocket Medal
7.6-7.12: Color Match: New Linked Jars & Cat Stages
7.13-7.19: Stack Match & Glorious Trophy
7.16-7.19: Football Night Emoji Pack
7.13-7.26: Summer Splash Limited Ring Royale

Optimized Spanish localization.

com.bettergames.real.drivingschool.simul.title: 운전 교실 3D 자동차 게임 : 자동차 주차의 달인
com.bettergames.real.drivingschool.simul.notes:
- Stability Update 6.5.09
- Some users were experiencing crash during game play scene load, the problem has been resolved
- Traffic cars changed and optimised for enhanced performance
- Some users were experiencing lags, the issue has been optimised
- Bugs fix and improvements
- Please reach us at supportteam@bettergamesstudio.com.au for reporting any technical issues and suggestions, We hope that this update will improve performance and a good gaming experience for our community. Enjoy!

com.outfit7.mytalkingtom.title: 마이토킹톰
com.outfit7.mytalkingtom.notes: Bug fixes and minor gameplay improvements.

jp.pokemon.pokemonchampions.title: Pokémon Champions
jp.pokemon.pokemonchampions.notes: Certain issues have been addressed in order to ensure a user-friendly experience.

com.firsttouch.dls7.title: Dream League Soccer 2026
com.firsttouch.dls7.notes:
It’s our Summer Spotlight update!
•Dynamic Stars – Collect Special Players, upgrading live with national team performances. Coming Soon! 
•New Facility – Upgrade your Fanzone for Clan bonuses and Stadium discounts. 
•International Football – Play our brand new “World Tournament” Event type. 
•Manager Accessories – Take control in style with North American themed items. 
•Clan Improvements – Communicate with new interactions and emoji reactions.

com.gameloft.asphalt9.title: 아스팔트 레전드
com.gameloft.asphalt9.notes:
Welcome to a brand-new update, featuring 2 seasons: AUDI SEASON and RAW CIRCUIT.

New cars!
6 new cars are arriving as we welcome Audi to the Asphalt family!

Sonic 35th Anniversary Spotlight
Long time no see! The Blue Blur returns in time to celebrate Sonic's 35th Anniversary!

Prototype Racing Spotlight
Get behind the wheel of an Audi for the very first time in Asphalt Legends!

Drive Syndicate: Operation Cerberus
The Drive Syndicate returns! Join the Syndicate and race for your latest target:

com.hitrock.hideonline.title: Hide Online: Prop Hunt
com.hitrock.hideonline.notes:
WINTER HOLIDAYS IN HIDE ONLINE
– Special winter map and Christmas gifts!
– Several Christmas packs and legendary skins!
– Improved game graphics, all maps have been updated.

com.maleo.bussimulatorid.ios.title: Bus Simulator Indonesia: Maleo
com.maleo.bussimulatorid.ios.notes: Various bug fixes to improve gameplay experience

com.zuuks.truck.simulator.ultimate.title: Truck Simulator : Ultimate
com.zuuks.truck.simulator.ultimate.notes: New trucks have been added. Mercedes-Benz Actros L 1848, Mercedes-Benz Actros L 1851, Mercedes-Benz Actros L 1853.

com.gamovation.chessclubpilot.title: Chess - Offline Board Game
com.gamovation.chessclubpilot.notes: Hello, have you beaten our Grandmaster yet? Our team is trying every day! Although we have not added any new features on this version, we have made some improvements that will enable you to continue playing chess without any problems! Have fun!

com.ANStudio.IndianVehicleSimulator3d.title: Indian Vehicle Simulator 3d
com.ANStudio.IndianVehicleSimulator3d.notes:
Airplanes, Helicopter Added
Airport Added
Mud Mod Modifications
New Tractors Added
New Cars Added
New Bikes Added

com.carxtech.sr.title: CarX Street
com.carxtech.sr.notes:
- New cars added: M24, LRC.
- New Special Offers added: Vice Grip, Twin Drive.
- New Speed League mode. Create races for up to 6 players and customize race rules to your preferences.
- Race video replays. Review your races, analyze results, and share the best moments with friends.
- Car physics frequency configuration added to improve gameplay performance.
- General bug fixes.

com.nguyenvh.holeio.title: Hole.io
com.nguyenvh.holeio.notes:
The hole keeps growing, and so does the experience.
 
• NEW LOOK, SAME HUNGER - A redesigned in-game screen built for clarity, so nothing stands between you and your next meal.
• MAP PROGRESS - Updated visuals and tutorials make tracking your path through each map smoother than ever.
• EVERY SCREEN, PERFECTLY FITTED - UI improvements across all devices for a seamless experience wherever you play.
 
Swallow it all. Update now!

com.easybrain.number.puzzle.game.title: Number Match - 숫자 퍼즐
com.easybrain.number.puzzle.game.notes:
- Performance and stability improvements

We read all your reviews and always try to make the game better. Please leave us some feedback if you love what we do and feel free to suggest any improvements. Challenge your brain with Number Match puzzle and have fun!

com.fungames.blockcraft.title: 블록 공예 3D: 의 도시 설계 시뮬레이터 가장

com.ea.nfs2014.bv.title: Need for Speed: No Limits 레이싱
com.ea.nfs2014.bv.notes:
Here's what to expect from this update:

- Ronin is out with their guard down and a Porsche Mission R, What could go wrong? Find out in Typhoon!
- Get your crew ready to complete missions and claim the new LAND ROVER Range Rover Sport SVR!
- Celebrate Independence with the Patriot Wrap from the Crew Stash, and unlock the Loud-n-Proud Wrap for free!
- 4 Flashbacks!
- Fixed a few bugs, for more information check Patch Notes.

We hope you enjoy the new update!

com.crazylabs.fashionsquad.title: Glow Fashion Idol
com.crazylabs.fashionsquad.notes:
Your Glow just got smoother!
We've improved performance, fixed bugs, and made technical enhancements to ensure a more reliable experience.

com.supercell.magic.title: 클래시 오브 클랜
com.supercell.magic.notes:
Going Global!
·   New Global Chat: Join and create Chat Groups with players worldwide and get the latest village news in Town Square!
·   Hero Journey: Earn Ore Chests and tackle unique challenges on a brand-new reward track in the Hero Hall!
·   New Dark Elixir Troop: Ruin Witch crafts loyal Ruin Knights from the debris of destroyed buildings!
·   New Dark Elixir Spell: The Angry Spell raises the tempers of your troops, forcing them to target defenses temporarily.

com.yalla.yallagame.title: Yalla Ludo - Ludo&Jackaroo
com.yalla.yallagame.notes:
Updates:
1.The Grand Prize Challenge is coming soon! Join the challenge for a chance to win generous rewards!
2.Ludo VIP Room experience upgraded! VIP Room now supports all game modes in the [Others] tab. Invite your friends and enjoy the fun together!
3.The chatroom section optimized! A language filter has been added to the [Hot] page, making it easier to find the rooms you like.
There's more content for you to explore and enjoy!

com.kitkagames.fallbuddies.title: Stumble Guys
com.kitkagames.fallbuddies.notes:
What's New in Version 0.99.1
Get ready for the Stumble Cup football craze!
New Level: Team up in Stumble Cup and dominate the pitch using Boot, Haymaker, and Freeze.
New Events: Check up daily for engaging Stumble Cup events!
New Ability: Hold the line with Block Wall. Deploy a defensive barrier to disrupt your rivals.
Use emotes, test your gear, and meet other players in our new interactive pre-match space.
General bug fixes and server updates.
Go for the goal!

com.netflix.NGP.Kamo.title: 레드 데드 리뎀션 NETFLIX
com.netflix.NGP.Kamo.notes: We've squashed bugs and made behind-the-scenes improvements to bring Netflix members the best possible gameplay experience.

com.dvloper.granny.title: Granny
com.dvloper.granny.notes: * Fixed an incorrect link in a menu button.

io.heseri.plane.title: Epic Plane Evolution
io.heseri.plane.notes: - Faster Launch: The game now starts quicker - less loading, more flying!

com.chadtowns.da2.title: Mini Militia - Doodle Army 2
com.chadtowns.da2.notes:
- In-game Friends is here! Now you can add players as friends and play custom games together! 
Note - just make sure you and your friends are on this latest app version, only then you could find them and play together
- You can also search for other players by nickname or ID, and add them as friends directly in the game regardless of your account type (including guests)
- In addition, we’ve made some bug fixes related to Friends.

com.GybeGames.ColorBlockJam.title: Color Block Jam
com.GybeGames.ColorBlockJam.notes:
Business as usual
We've tackled some bugs to ensure smoother and more reliable overall performance.
